creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
The nvidia-driver ports (/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver,
	/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-71xx, and
	/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96xx) live in /usr/ports/x11, but
	yet we have /usr/ports/x11-drivers for X drivers.  All other
	drivers of this type live in /usr/ports/x11-drivers

Fix: 

Repo copy
	/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver
	/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-71xx
	/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-96xx
	to /usr/ports/x11-drivers
How-To-Repeat: 
	$ ls -1 -d /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-*
